languages.text: Чтобы начать перелет, кликните {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} по выбранной системе и нажмите кнопку отправления.
To initiate travel, click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on a system and press the warp travel button.
languages.original_text: Чтобы начать перелет, кликните {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} по выбранной системе и нажмите кнопку отправления.

traits.locale_text: To initiate travel, click [LMB] on a system and press the warp travel button.
To initiate travel, click [LMB] on a system and press the warp travel button.
To initiate travel, click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on a system and press the warp travel button.
To initiate travel, click [LMB] on a system and press the warp travel button.
To initiate travel, click [LMB] on a system and press the warp travel button.

languages.text: {mouse_icon|LeftMouse}点击需要前往的星系，之后点击“亚空间航行”按钮，即可踏上旅程。
languages.original_text: To initiate travel, click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on a system and press the warp travel button.

traits.locale_text: 鼠标左键点击需要前往的星系，之后点击“亚空间航行”按钮，即可踏上旅程。

languages.text: 旅を開始するには、星系の上で{mouse_icon|LeftMouse}をクリックし、<歪み>移動ボタンを押す。
languages.original_text: To initiate travel, click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on a system and press the warp travel button.

traits.locale_text: 旅を開始するには、星系の上で [LMB] をクリックし、<歪み>航行ボタンを押す。

languages.text: Para iniciar el viaje, pulsa el {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} sobre un sistema y el botón de Viaje disforme.
languages.original_text: To initiate travel, click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on a system and press the warp travel button.

traits.locale_text: Para iniciar el viaje, pulsa el [botón izquierdo del ratón] sobre un sistema y el botón de Viaje disforme.

languages.text: Zum Start der Reise klickst du mit {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} auf ein System und klickst auf die Schaltfläche Warp-Reise.
languages.original_text: To initiate travel, click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on a system and press the warp travel button.

traits.locale_text: Zum Start der Reise klickst du mit der [LMB] auf ein System und klickst auf die Schaltfläche Warp-Reise.

languages.text: Pour commencer à vous déplacer, cliquez avec le {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} sur un système et appuyez sur le bouton Voyage dans le Warp.
languages.original_text: To initiate travel, click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on a system and press the warp travel button.

traits.locale_text: Pour commencer à vous déplacer, cliquez avec le [BGS] sur un système et appuyez sur le bouton Voyage dans le Warp.

languages.text: Yolculuğu başlatmak için bir sisteme {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} tıkla ve öteboyut yolculuğu düğmesine bas.
languages.original_text: To initiate travel, click {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} on a system and press the warp travel button.

traits.locale_text: Yolculuğu başlatmak için bir sisteme {mouse_icon|LeftMouse} tıkla ve öteboyut yolculuğu düğmesine bas.
